name: hardness-tester
description: Electron + React 19 + Node.js hardness tester app

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../backend/native/hardness-addon && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BE,FE,EL "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:backend: dotenv -e .env -e backend/.env -- npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev:frontend: dotenv -e .env -e frontend/.env -- npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:prod: dotenv -e .env.prod -e backend/.env.prod -e frontend/.env.prod -- npm run build
